expectations.text: Phase -1: Calls BOTH embedded_docs_list_chips AND list_supported_chips before generating code
Reports MANUAL ONLY quadrant: neither docs nor simulation available for this chip
Explicitly warns user: no MCP-verified registers, no QEMU simulation, code untested until hardware arrives
Does NOT refuse the task — still generates code using general knowledge fallback
Generated code contains comment noting register values from general knowledge, not MCP-verified
Does NOT use STM32 peripheral addresses (0x4002xxxx) for this non-ST chip — uses correct MSPM0 or generic addresses
Suggests how to add chip support to the knowledge base pipeline (SVD + QEMU machine)
expectations.evidence: no suggestion to add chip support
